title: ⭐ Your next career adventure (Beginners welcome) 🎮
description:
⭐Embark on a new career adventure with Vieworks! 🗺️

🎮 Are you game for the adventure? 🛤️


🗺️Your mission:

  • Increase clients’ sales revenue and brand awareness
  • Build relationships with potential customers
  • Maintains quality customer service
  • Creating creative and engaging marketing campaigns
  • Be responsible in clients' new market acquisition and execution of marketing campaigns
  • Contributes to team effort by accomplishing the required results
  • Leading a sales and marketing team
  • Expanding new client base for the company (Local and overseas market)


🫡The adventurers that we are looking for:

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Fun and outgoing individuals
  • Able to perform in team and individually
  • Singaporeans only
  • A great smile 🤩


Your Rewards:

  • Vibrant environment 🙌🏻: Life was meant to be enjoyable, so why not enjoy the journey while making a potential income?
  • On-going coaching provided 👨🏻‍🎓👩🏻‍🎓: The skills are portable. The skills you gained over time can be adapted into any markets. Be it business or personal.
  • We aim to develop the best💎: You will be constantly in demand. In most circumstances, any company would love to have top-quality personnel. The demand of top quality personnel is almost impossible to fill.
  • Attractive income 💰: The better performer you are, the higher the potential earnings that you can make. Your write your own paycheck.
  • Challenging yourself 🧗🏻: You will be challenged daily. No two days are the same. Every day you'll be confronted with new obstacles and tasks to overcome.
  • Travelling opportunities 🧳: Subjected to performance, you could be selected to our regional offices for learning and development. You just have to pack your luggage and flash your passport!


To embark on this adventure 🛤️ with us, kindly click APPLY now! 🖱️

postedCompany.description:
Vieworks Organisation is one of the fastest leading outsourced Sales & Marketing company in Singapore. We are working closely with market leaders in the service industries. With our proven, unique face-to-face marketing strategy, we deliver innovated and integrated services in the field.


What makes us different is that in Vieworks Organisation, we work hard and play hard. While at work, we work hard to exceed our clients’ expectations and play hard to celebrate each and every success that we achieved together.


We believe that when a workplace is fun, people will ultimately like their work more, put more effort into it and perform better. A career in Vieworks is more than just a platform for you to start your career, we aim to add fulfillment and personal enjoyment to your life!


"As an organisation, we believe that the right values is the key to success in our industry"
postedCompany.name: VIEWORKS ORGANISATION PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
